summary: Missing reviews, structured data, and cross-sell recommendations - high-impact conversion elements absent from this premium fitness brand page.
tips: Add review count and star rating visible above the fold - currently no social proof elements detected
Implement Product schema.org JSON-LD markup for product, offer, and review data
Add 'Frequently Bought Together' or 'Complete the Look' cross-sell section near the Add to Cart button
Include a size guide link or fit finder - critical for apparel to reduce returns
Add trust badges near CTA: free returns, secure checkout, money-back guarantee
Implement Shop Pay and BNPL (Klarna/Afterpay) payment options
Add estimated delivery date on product page to reduce purchase anxiety
Include comparison pricing (compare-at) to show savings or value
Add model measurements and fabric details in product description
Implement FAQ schema for common product questions
